task_completion.description: Navigate to the admin user's profile or settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the FreeScout user profile or settings page, with the email 'admin@helpdesk.local' visible.

task_completion.description: Access the API Tokens management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'API', 'API Tokens', or 'Developer' tab/section within the FreeScout interface.
Screenshot shows a token creation modal or form with the exact name 'MetricsDash' typed into the name or description field.
Screenshot shows the successfully generated API token string displayed in the FreeScout UI (usually a long alphanumeric string shown immediately after creation).

task_completion.description: Save the generated token to the specified file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a text editor (like nano, gedit) or a terminal command (like echo) saving the exact generated token string to the file path '/home/ga/metrics_token.txt'.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeScout web interface to generate the token
integrity.visual_evidence: The token creation process should be visible in a web browser interacting with the FreeScout UI, not executed via backend scripts, curl commands, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: The saved token is the actual generated token
integrity.visual_evidence: The string saved to the text file must exactly match the cryptographic token string displayed in the FreeScout UI, rather than a placeholder word or a made-up string.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file to the exact requested path
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal must clearly show the file being saved specifically to '/home/ga/metrics_token.txt', not a generic 'token.txt' in another directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected token name is exactly 'MetricsDash'. The token must be generated for the admin user associated with the email 'admin@helpdesk.local'. The final generated token string must be saved to the absolute file path '/home/ga/metrics_token.txt'.
